archetype: 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for custom green accent

design_philosophy.rationale: This tool protects Etsy sellers' businesses and income. The UI must inspire confidence through pristine spacing, sharp typography, and a lack of visual clutter. The stark white background with a highly specific green accent grounds the interface.

typography.notes: Do not use Inter or Roboto. Follow the hierarchy gap rule. Avoid overly bold headers; use medium or semi-bold for elegance.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs. Use p-8 or p-12 for main containers.

grids.marketing: Asymmetrical, spacious. Use gap-8 to gap-12. Allow negative space.
grids.dashboard: Tight, dense, structured. Use gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel utilized.

layout_spacing.alignment: Left-align forms, dense content, and data tables. Center-align hero headers only if balanced.

surfaces_and_components.cards: Flat solid backgrounds. 1px border-border. No heavy drop shadows. Radius max 4px (rounded-sm).
surfaces_and_components.header: Solid white background with 1px hard bottom border (border-border).
surfaces_and_components.buttons: Subtle radius (rounded-sm). Primary button uses #2D9B6F. Ensure hover state is lighter or has a subtle opacity change.
surfaces_and_components.inputs: Shadcn defaults but with rounded-sm, border-border, and focus-visible:ring-primary.

animation_motion.hover: Subtle lift (-translate-y-[1px]) or slight border color darken for cards. Explicit hover text colors.

hero_accent.description: Minimal clean white desk with plant. Use as an accent or split-screen background on the landing page if visual interest is needed without clutter.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load Google Fonts: 'Outfit' (Headings) and 'Plus Jakarta Sans' (Body). Do not use Inter.
Update tailwind.config.js to include font families and modify index.css with the exact CSS variables provided.
Ensure the primary accent #2D9B6F is strictly used for the most important actions to keep the minimal aesthetic.
Dashboard table should be clean, dense, using Shadcn Table without outer card shadows.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, toggles, row actions).
Evidence Vault page must display a grid of the provided evidence screenshot URLs.
Alert settings toggles should use Shadcn Switch components.
Do not use transparent headers over any content; ensure header is solid white with a bottom border.
